---
title: "vector_router.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\vector_router.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.72
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.02
---

## Intent
The `vector_router.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on VectorRouter, __init__, get_top_domain. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via VectorRouter, __init__, get_top_domain. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `VectorRouter`
- `__init__`
- `get_top_domain`
